text.tspan: BNB Momentum Trading Agent — full execution flow
One allocator tick(), end to end · pillars: CMC (data) · TWAK (execution) · BNB AI Agent SDK (identity)
Read DOWN the left column (entry → guards → risk), jump at Ⓐ, then DOWN the right column (decide → execute → persist). Every guard fails safe — skip or halt, never crash.
return codes: 0 = ok / no-op · 1 = drawdown HALT (flattened) · 2 = skip this tick (guard tripped)
BNB ETH CAKE LINK UNI AVAX DOT (DOGE dropped: campaign)
HWM = max(nav, HWM) · dd = (HWM − nav) / HWM
no — within cap → continue at Ⓐ (top of DECIDE, right)
TA-health · TA token-scores · intel · active tokens
strategy · nav b/a · dd · regime · cap · target · weights
surfaced live → Mission Control CMC Agent Hub panel
shares the same flock · read-only HWM
flatten-only · no opens · no HWM reset
pluggable registry: momentum_adaptive (default) + 9 sibling strategies + 9 aliases
+ de-risk overlays · spot via TWAK · NO leverage
campaign: 10% halt + profit-lock (lock the good path)
HONEST EDGE: no fixed 7d alpha → built to SURVIVE the
overlays (de-risk only, never lever): vol_target · ma_filter
LIVE pins the default · SIM picks via dashboard
make campaign · strategy_campaign.py (every arm, one shot)
→ risk-first leaderboard · default locked · no auto-promote
